name: Hwabao WP S&P US Cosmt Eq (QDII-LOF)CNH
summary: Hwabao WP S&P US Cosmt Eq (QDII-LOF)CNH is a fund that invests in US consumer equities, tracking the S&P US Consumer Discretionary Index, and is structured as a Qualified Domestic Institutional Investor (QDII) Listed Open-Ended Fund (LOF), denominated in CNH (offshore Renminbi). The fund allows mainland Chinese investors to access overseas markets. It is managed by Hwabao WP Fund Management Co., Ltd., based in China.
